message:
🐛 Remove image-scanning workflow (not applicable for CLI binary)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,36 +0,0 @@
-name: Image Scanning
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - '**/Dockerfile*'
-      - 'go.mod'
-      - 'go.sum'
-      - '.github/workflows/image-scanning.yml'
-  pull_request:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - '**/Dockerfile*'
-      - 'go.mod'
-      - 'go.sum'
-  schedule:
-    - cron: '0 8 * * 0'  # Weekly scan on Sunday
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-  security-events: write
-
-concurrency:
-  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
-  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' }}
-
-jobs:
-  scan:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-image-scanning.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit
-    # Customize inputs per repo:
-    # with:
-    #   dockerfile: 'path/to/Dockerfile'
-    #   context: '.'
